title: The Final Report
module_title: Professional Pentest Report Delivery and Remediation Roadmap
learning_objectives: Write executive summaries translating technical findings to business language
Present detailed technical findings with evidence
Create actionable risk matrices and remediation roadmaps
Produce professional reports exceeding industry standards
scenario: Week-long pentest complete. Write the deliverable: a professional report meeting industry standards.

scenario_context.setting: End of comprehensive penetration test engagement
scenario_context.challenge: Communicate technical findings to diverse stakeholders
scenario_context.relevance: Report quality determines client satisfaction and future business

subtasks.title: Executive Summary
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Write 1-page summary highlighting business impact, not technical details. Focus on risk, budget implications, and remediation timeline.

subtasks.title: Methodology Section
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Document phases executed, tools used, timeframe, scope limitations, and methodology references.

subtasks.title: Findings Section
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Write 5+ findings with: title, severity, description, impact, evidence, remediation, CVSS score. Use consistent template.

subtasks.title: Risk Matrix
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Create risk matrix by severity/likelihood. Develop remediation timeline (immediate, 30 days, 90 days, 6 months).

subtasks.title: Technical Appendices
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Organize technical evidence: scan outputs, exploitation logs, screenshots, PCAP files. Label and reference from findings.

subtasks.title: Report Review
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Review entire report for consistency, accuracy, professional formatting, grammar, and client readiness.

resources.name: Professional Report Writing for Penetration Testing

reflection_prompt: How would you explain the most critical finding to a non-technical executive? What remediation timeline is realistic?

quiz.question: What should an executive summary focus on?
quiz.explanation: Executives need business context: impact on operations, budget implications, and remediation timeline. Technical details belong in main report.

quiz.question: Why is remediation specificity critical in pentest reports?
options: Generic recommendations leave organizations unsure how to fix
quiz.explanation: Specific remediation steps with configuration examples enable the organization to fix issues efficiently.

mentor_notes: Report quality is paramount. Executive summary must translate technical to business. Findings should be thorough with clear evidence and remediation. Professional polish matters greatly. 72-hour deadline appropriate for report completion.
